amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Article 32 — paragraph 3
body_md:
**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Article 32 — paragraph 3

## Text proposed by the Commission

3. The notification shall include full details of the conformity assessment activities, the conformity assessment module or modules and the artificial intelligence technologies concerned.

## Amendment of the European Parliament

3. The notification referred to in paragraph 2 shall include full details of the conformity assessment activities, the conformity assessment module or modules and the artificial intelligence technologies concerned , as well as the relevant attestation of competence .
commission_text: 3. The notification shall include full details of the conformity assessment activities, the conformity assessment module or modules and the artificial intelligence technologies concerned.
parliament_text: 3. The notification referred to in paragraph 2 shall include full details of the conformity assessment activities, the conformity assessment module or modules and the artificial intelligence technologies concerned , as well as the relevant attestation of competence .
